title: Scorching Sands
writer: Pierre Gaspard-Huit, José Gutiérrez Maesso, Marc-Gilbert Sauvajon
actors: Anna Karina, Gérard Barray, Antonio Vilar
plot: Sheherazade is promised to a powerful Sultan as a gift in exchange for free passage to the Holy Land. When the Sultan's underling saves her from certain death, she falls madly in love with her hero.
